column3: An attribute assignment event recording an update to an existing document. Records the editor, the scale of the update, the timespan of the update, and the text content after the update.
Document Note: Document Update Model Overview

column1: Document Note: Document Update Model Overview
column3: This model captures the provenance of document updates. Each update event records the editor responsible, the scale of their involvement, the timespan of their activity, and the resulting text content. The P190 value on the document entity reflects the current text; the accumulation of E13 update events in the graph preserves the full editorial history. The model is intentionally source-agnostic; wiki edits, CMS updates, and manual revisions all map to the same structure.
The document that was updated. Links back to the simple_document model.
The person or organisation who carried out this update.
E41: Unique System Label or ID

column1: E41: Unique System Label or ID
column3: Required within some documentation or database systems, such as ResearchSpace required label.
The scale of this editor's involvement. Selected from a controlled list: initial_contribution, major_contribution, minor_contribution, micro_contribution, final_contribution.

A fixed type indicating the property being updated by this attribute assignment. Fixed value: P190_has_symbolic_content. Indicates that this update assigns new symbolic content to the target document.
The timespan of this editor's activity on the document, from the earliest to latest recorded edit.

The text content of the document after this update. The P190 value on the document entity will reflect the most recent update; earlier text states are recoverable via the sequence of E13 update events and their associated E73 nodes.
